name: linkedout
description: LinkedOut backend monorepo (API + shared packages). apps/web is owned by the frontend team.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @linkedout/contracts build && pnpm --filter @linkedout/db build && pnpm --filter @linkedout/session-authority build && pnpm --filter @linkedout/internal-auth build && pnpm --filter @linkedout/api build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @linkedout/contracts lint && pnpm --filter @linkedout/db lint && pnpm --filter @linkedout/session-authority lint && pnpm --filter @linkedout/internal-auth lint && pnpm --filter @linkedout/api lint && pnpm lint:scripts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @linkedout/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter @linkedout/db typecheck && pnpm --filter @linkedout/session-authority typecheck && pnpm --filter @linkedout/internal-auth typecheck && pnpm --filter @linkedout/api typecheck
scripts.test:all: pnpm test && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:integration: pnpm build && ALLOW_TEST_DB_RESET=1 TEST_DB_EXPECTED_SESSION_USER=linkedout pnpm db:test:setup && ALLOW_TEST_DB_RESET=1 TEST_DB_EXPECTED_SESSION_USER=linkedout pnpm --filter @linkedout/api test:integration
